title: Remove "Create a Workform" ad from form's Thank You page
excerpt:
The Thank You page of a WorkForms form has an ad for “Create a WorkForm” after you submit the form. 
How do I get rid of this?

posts.author: mark.stout (Mark Stout)
posts.cookedHtml:
The Thank You page of a WorkForms form has an ad for “Create a WorkForm” after you submit the form.

How do I get rid of this?

posts.author: pedro.duarte (Pedro Duarte)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mark,

You can’t: I am having the same issue and reached out to monday.com through proper channels.
We need to include this in a new feature request and vote hard to get rid of this soon…
I will create the new request and reply again so that you can vote: two votes will be in at least.

Cheers,
pedro.

posts.author: Rlmatchette77 (Rebecca Matchette )
posts.cookedHtml: I’m having the same issue in removing the advertisement on thank you page. I have competitors that are trying to copy my process and business.

posts.author: jasonic_boom (Jason Sheeley)
posts.cookedHtml: there’s an option to fwd to a url. I love monday.com for so many reasons but brotha eww bad call on that form ad. Guess ill go make a webpage to fwd to now!

posts.author: mitchellgp (Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeap same here, nice looking redesign but awful awful call to have a non removable ad there all of a sudden!

posts.author: Gene_Houghton (Gene)
posts.cookedHtml: I am meeting with our monday.com rep today and will ask them about this.

posts.author: ECML (Michael-Anthony Lutfy)
posts.cookedHtml: 100% agree. The “It’s time to create a WorkForm” call-to-action is so strong, and it takes up 1/3 the visual space!

posts.author: nHaus (nHaus)
posts.cookedHtml: This should be remove especially if you are a paid subscriber.

posts.author: ND-Dan (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml: Where do I vote? I really want to be able to remove this.
